news.t: Which Is the Best Dividend ETF to Grab 9% Returns?
Here are some dividend ETFs to consider as the group comes back into favor with investors

holdings.infoBox: DIV is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Millicom International Cellular stock at 2.80%, Tsakos Energy Navigation at 2.76%, CBL & Associates Properties at 2.67%, FLEX LNG at 2.32%, and Alexander's at 2.31%.

overview.description: The Global X SuperDividend US ETF (DIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks an equally weighted index of 50 high-dividend, low-volatility securities. DIV was launched on Mar 11, 2013 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Indxx SuperDividend U.S. Low Volatility Index

data.title: Which Is the Best Dividend ETF to Grab 9% Returns?
data.text: Global X SuperDividend ETF ($SDIV), iShares Emerging Markets Dividend ETF ($DVYE), and Global X SuperDividend US ETF ($DIV) are among the top high-yield dividend ETFs. SDIV is the best choice…
